textByHash.2a4a6b683678a3c087f9e7f8aa5e735947e30dce: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, Ilfeen of the Elves can enchant your crystal seed into a Halberd, a locked door under Ape Atoll becomes unlocked, The Void Knights can upgrade your Void armour, the
textByHash.2ae76159f0480f7ecf186ce39a9ac3697fba6b96: Hunter master in the Feldip hills will allow you to hunt in his private hunting ground, teleport crystals can now hold 5 charges, Rantz will provide you with 100 ogre arrows every day and the banner will teleport you to
textByHash.3d4bce55f1880a7dfacdce0fa85ada7bcbcdd6d4: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, two Chompy birds will always appear and they have a chance of dropping a pet, Nieve will reward your slayer assignments with more points and Rantz will provide
textByHash.3ec5d6a57424e421af7ab6be1d6973a65ea6e870: teleport you to Piscatoris once per day.
textByHash.4438609e95adf7f614607cc4954f282f4958a654: This banner is a symbol of your exploration of the Western Provinces. You now have a 25% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will provide you with 25 free ogre arrows every day.
textByHash.5de7532d2a1f145c86ae7b0c5ad4016f76358568: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, two Chompy birds will always appear and they have a chance of dropping a pet, Steve will reward your slayer assignments with more points and Rantz will provide
textByHash.6cac27e0d8e9827332ff0db56cf9ad1df5191ddb: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.
textByHash.70e49bdd41b40d2114bf27a980c0a4898f19ccb7: If you complete all of the easy tasks in the Western Diary, you have a 25% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will provide you with 25 free ogre arrows every day.
textByHash.78e7f4211abf9e3aa8f8b708c2bf1b38a09297d8: You need to complete all of the easy too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.
textByHash.7ed1074771de8189be0ebed95430e6037aca875c: you with 150 free ogre arrows every day. The banner will teleport you to Piscatoris as much as you desire and you may resurrect once per day while battling Zulrah.
textByHash.7ff74ad7909c3f6412aace9e11c321e6ca95eb26: Well, there are four different Western banners, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to
textByHash.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHash.af79327c31c07d1c289e754f1a2a216db545b045: Void armour, the Hunter master in the Feldip hills will allow you to hunt in his private hunting ground, teleport crystals can now hold 5 charges, Rantz will provide you with 100 ogre arrows every day and the banner will
textByHash.b39e7f74f6e0e53910ed89baf93051ac6df47e22: I've upgraded your Western banner for you. The Crystal saw will now last for twice as long before reverting to seed, you now have a 50% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will
textByHash.b450a26e419ab16e10a8ad5c0795d1c68c9f49ad: I've upgraded your Western banner for you. Two Chompy birds will now always appear and they have a chance of dropping a pet, Steve will reward your slayer assignments with more points and Rantz will provide
textByHash.bca87d5b57f4a68f1221368fde51e8cb9b64669f: I'm the eldest of the Gnome children and master of tasks for the Western Provinces Achievement Diary.
textByHash.bda7775820bd1b2cda1a5fe7db313b0ff3d85d6a: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Western Provinces! Here's your reward!
textByHash.c241d8f7d1d02e32c6df7d3fdd281aeeb2c28444: If you ever lose your banner, come back to me to reclaim it.
textByHash.c3ec73e09e9168b0e41fe918f47567b405b403fd: In addition to the easy rewards, the Crystal saw will last for twice as long before reverting to seed, you have a 50% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will provide you with 50 free ogre
textByHash.c55936b67d734b7a797f8c1b413d7870ffa2ac59: Just complete the tasks in the Western provinces so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.da35d7c44fddd4c5bbc4be41aa44c1b7e3c91dc7: I've upgraded your Western banner for you. Ilfeen of the Elves can now enchant your crystal seed into a Halberd, a locked door under Ape Atoll has been unlocked, The Void Knights can now upgrade your
textByHash.df5997b3f4829c4444d2a2c81e684200d632e11a: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Western Provinces it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.
textByHash.f8ecc2768e5d2d5e70d7366ba42f6e945977b47e: provide you with 50 free ogre arrows every day.
